name: GPIBGetFloatResult
title: GPIBGetFloatResult
description: Helper functions for extracting numeric values from GPIB response strings.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The string in buffer, which may have been obtained by the GPIBResponse function, is searched for a floating-point number, using the function strtod of C/C++. If a space character is present in the string, the search for the number starts at the first such character.
